use_cases: Portfolio section for creative professionals showcasing their best work
Project gallery for design studios displaying case studies
Showcase page for SaaS products with rich media cards
Works section for agency websites with interactive hover states
Personal portfolio with smooth mouse-tracking animations
ai_summary: An interactive project showcase component featuring a grid of portfolio cards with images, titles, descriptions, and years. Implements smooth mouse-tracking animations using lerp interpolation and hover state transitions for a polished, premium feel. Ideal for creative portfolios, agency sites, and SaaS product showcases requiring engaging visual presentation of work samples.
